====Pokémon====
{{MissingInfo|2|enva|java}}
This listing is of Winona's known {{OBP|Pokémon|species}} in {{aniseries|PTS}}:
{{TrainerPoké
|trainer=Winona
|pkmn=Skarmory
|type1=Steel
|type2=Flying
|img=Winona Skarmory.png
|epnum=AG084
|epname=Who's Flying Now?
|vajp=
|vaen=
|desc=Winona's {{pkmn2|giant}} {{p|Skarmory}} only appeared during the [[Feather Carnival]]. Each time, it would bring a child and Winona on its back and fly around the festival. Its customers included {{an|May}} and [[Max]]. It also helped defeat {{TRT}}, who were stealing Pokémon from the festival. It was not used in the gym battle against Ash, possibly due to it being a giant Pokémon.

Skarmory's known moves are {{m|Steel Wing}} and {{m|Drill Peck}}.}}

{{TrainerPoké
|main=yes
|trainer=Winona
|pkmn=Altaria
|type1=Dragon
|type2=Flying
|img=Winona Altaria.png
|epnum=AG085
|epname=Sky High Gym Battle!
|vajp=Chinami Nishimura
|vaen=Chinami Nishimura
|desc=The first Pokémon Winona used in her Gym battle against Ash was her {{p|Altaria}}. Altaria's attacks did not work against {{AP|Grovyle}} due to its speed. It was ultimately defeated with {{m|Leaf Blade}} despite having the type advantage.}}

{{TrainerPoké
|trainer=Winona
|pkmn=Pelipper
|type1=Water
|type2=Flying
|img=Winona Pelipper.png
|epnum=AG085
|epname=Sky High Gym Battle!
|vajp=Chie Satō
|vaen=Kayzie Rogers
|desc=Winona's {{p|Pelipper}} was the second Pokémon she used against Ash. Ash battled with {{AP|Pikachu}}, starting with a {{m|Thunderbolt}}. Pelipper countered with Steel Wing as a ground. Pelipper then used Hydro Pump, but its wing lost contact with the ground and Pikachu took advantage of its mistake to use {{m|Thunder}}. Both Pelipper and Pikachu were knocked out due to the damage they took.

Pelipper's known moves are {{m|Steel Wing}}, {{m|Quick Attack}}, and {{m|Hydro Pump}}.}}

{{TrainerPoké
|trainer=Winona
|pkmn=Swellow
|shiny=yes
|type1=Normal
|type2=Flying
|img=Winona Swellow.png
|epnum=AG085
|epname=Sky High Gym Battle!
|vajp=Kōichi Sakaguchi
|vaen=Darren Dunstan
|desc=The final Pokémon Winona used against Ash was her {{Shiny}} {{p|Swellow}}. It was a strong battler, using powerful attacks like Aerial Ace and Hyper Beam. It defeated Ash's Grovyle easily and almost defeated {{AP|Swellow}} as well, but with a little quick thinking on Ash's part, his Swellow was victorious, winning Ash the Feather Badge.

Winona's Swellow was the first Shiny Pokémon owned by a [[Gym Leader]].

Swellow's known moves are {{m|Aerial Ace}}, {{m|Peck}}, and {{m|Hyper Beam}}.}}
